title: Verify private candidate validation
preconditions: An owner-only temporal corpus contains passing rows, incorrect-application canaries, drift, conflicts, stale fingerprints, and complete expected outcomes.
steps: Validate passing and failing candidates; remove or stale each fingerprint; make the corpus unavailable; inspect aggregate report and tracked or diagnostic outputs.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-RULE-VALIDATION holds: all rows are accounted, unsafe candidates cannot activate or gain broad authority, the prior active set remains usable, and raw private evidence is not exported.
